title: I Don't Wanna Feel Nothin' No More
original_title: I Don't Wanna Feel Nothin' No More
overview: Seen through the eyes of Rebecca Gibbs, a young abuse victim, I DON'T WANNA FEEL NOTHIN' NO MORE is an intense drama that chronicles three generations of incest among the women in one family as they struggle to maintain their strength and dignity against almost overwhelming odds.
